content: Collateral might not give capital,but cash flow gives repayment, clients thinking I have 3x value collateral so I can get capital and run business.People often apply the saying "where there's a will, there's a way" to everything.But not like to all,if your property 3x value somebody shows interest to buy land,why don't you lost chance?Couldn't you sell your property and run the business with those funds, instead of having to grovel before anyone?you will not face pressure.We have over Decades of experience in fund facilitating,we are working with multiple lenders(PSU,PRIVATE AND NBFSCs)We do structured debt,NCD's, Equity and JV.please contact us+919848930666(All Over India).
comment: Collateral can support a deal, but lenders ultimately underwrite cash generation, governance and repayment visibility. Asset value alone doesn't replace a viable business model.
